> Do that way whole waking hours. That will exercise your (ADH-thirst) connection.
>
> Eat once/day, assign one hour for that activity.
> Do that at least 2-3 hours before sleep time.
>
> .............

Ok [@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/). Usually between 7:30 pm and 4:30am I have no problems getting to sleep as I have obstructive sleep apnea and fall asleep crazy quickly. It's after an acceptable time in my mind when I say to myself "I think I have enough sleep to function today, so lets get going (in excitement).

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-16T21:34:48+0300

This reminds me of a story a doctor once told me. She had a patient in her office. Completely A-type. CEO of a major company. Kids. BUSY BUSY BUSY. The doctor told her to just sit still for a moment and do NOTHING in the office. It was a struggle. The patient broke down in tears because she couldn't just do nothing. She couldn't do it. She balled,and balled, and balled. She mental brokedown.

At the heart of that story, is a heart/mind I resonate with.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-09-16T21:52:37+0300

How can your life be what you want it to be when you're frozen? This occurs from when your mind and heart are not open. You have to be able to learn to pack your own parachute by relearning how to think. Then you have to collect the right people. Those people have to help you pack your parachute when the present is not clear to you before you jump without wings.

"On paper, I've thrown a lot of money, really quickly, at the Jack Kruse experience. On the outside, sometimes I wonder what people think and how it appears? "Wait, he's been to the farm, two vips, etc, but in yet he's still super lazy to implement any change and action? What does that say about Jack? And the truth and the response is that Jack will lead you to the water. He can move mountains, and take you through miles of desert, time travel even... but once you arrive at that beautiful fountain with water trickling down in that serene place... and you neglect to taste the water... well.. that is on YOU, that is on ME, and not on Jack. .. Oh, these thing take time."

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-17T12:32:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278024>

SUPER QUICK CHECK-IN

I'm calling defeat tonight. I went to bed at 10pm and was up at 12am wide awake and wired. I tried to lay there and be with myself. I did it until I couldn't take it anymore. The muscle will grow stronger with time and practice...

This is damage control.

1\. Taking the complete day off work to heal
2\. ZERO social media today. I'll allow a quick check in on the forum here and there.
3\. REST. LIE THERE. SLEEP. And repeat all day today.
4.DHA LOAD. [@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) I realize the most efficient way to get in my sardines in water is to DRINK IT. I'm going to buy like 50 cans of sardines today. And do maybe a 5 can smoothie 10X over the course of the day.
5\. Going to get some ice. Ice baths in between rest cycles. as frequent as I can. I'll see if I can quickly find an outdoor tub to do this outside if the weather is nice.

J

Jaaasooooon...... LMAO

Why are you blending the canned sardines..? Arn´t they way easier to eat just plain. with maybe some olive oil/dressing? I had to laugh so much as I followed you in the video....lol This is how I do it with raw mackerel/herring heads.. but they are yucky and I cant eat them any other way..lol
But canned sardines I love to eat just as they are. They taste nice to me. It is better to not smoothie them if you can eat them as they are, because bigger pieces of animal food is better than smoothied stuff, because of how it gets digested.

But I think you were brave
I would like to invite you to taste a lambs-ball smoothie, that is something magical for guys! Seriously a testosterone bomb... I had to stop doing it because I got too much testosterone for my liking... But for a guy it is really cool  You just need to get raw balls from the butcher, they are dirt cheap. And it tastes way less bad than a fish head smoothie

### LieselK — 2019-09-17T20:06:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278064>

> [MITpowered26 said:](/goto/post?id=277900)
>
> [View attachment 13108](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/13108/) This is an important picture of me today.
>
> I went on a date. Met online about 3 weeks ago. I was patient. And then we booked the meet a week ago or so for AM coffee and stroll in the sunny dog park today.
>
> I think I might have somewhat pre judged her before the meet. I knew she wasn't my tribe, and therefore didn't have my values. But then it occurred to me, maybe she is mito-fam, and maybe she or I doesn't know it yet. I needed to give her a chance. And so I did.
>
> This picture represents personal meaning for me in this moment. My hair. I didn't do it. And she even commented when we first met, it looks like you just woke up... it was a 10am meet. I told her, no, I actually woke up at 6am this morning. Sounds ignorant. Sounds disrespectful. Maybe sounds cocky. But for me? Where I've come from...it was an expression of a cup filling up rapidly with SELF. I put truth over romance.
>
> I get first impressions, best foot forward, and all that jazz. But if your only card is your first card, whats the fucking point. The niceties, the front, etc. I knew in my heart, I was not desperate to make things happen. I found my tribe, my values, my way of life. My cup is filling for the first time.
>
> The date went well. Her vibe was relaxed. I think I'll see her again.
>
> J

I'm so proud of you! Be you authentically! It's worth it.

### Inger — 2019-09-17T20:07:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278065>

my fear was about abandonment. To be abandoned into complete loneliness

when I had really bad anxiety, what helped was to just be with it.. look at it.. and then I also imagined, if the past was cut off also no tomorrow, and I was just there, in this moment, in bed, alone, looking at the sky, listening to the wind... then I felt... peaceful. I felt fine, I realized everything was just fine! There was nothing to fear.

He”S in outer space.. alone...for 30 days.. and then suddenly there is a small sound.. a ticking.. it irritate him.. and with every passing moment.. the sound grows louder and louder. He panicks. He doesn’t know what to do. He knows the gravity of this situation. He he alone. In outer space. For thirty days. And if he doesn’t figure this out.. he is going to go crazy.. he realizes then in that moment.. the only way to get rid of the sound is to fall.. in.. love with it... and so he does .

and now, I often wonder how I feel so safe, I have this really good feeling of safety, even if I have no one to cling to, no one who is here for me. I am just alone. It is like I am learning to love myself now and I give myself that safe space of love - and I need no other to give it to me.

### Inger — 2019-09-17T20:35:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278080>

> [MITpowered26 said:](/goto/post?id=278069)
>
> Wow deep Inger!! I know I do have
> Abandonment issues .. big time.. I feel abandoned even when I’m at a cafe and I’m enjoying myself alone in the presence of other singular people.. and they pack up and leave.. I feel abandoned and take it personally! Isn’t that ludicrous !!!

totally. I can feel how you feel it.. You must have some really deep trauma.
What also have helped me is to be very careful with what I eat. The wilder my food is the better I feel. It is like it helps the healing process, it gives me power and courage to meet the pain.

Raw elk or deer heart have been some of the best healing foods for me.
Makes a really nice carpaccio, btw

Ron was visiting me and we had Galloway heart carpaccio. Next morning he told me that in the night he got some really weird feeling of warmness in his chest/belly, he had not experienced before.
I am pretty sure the heart we had was the reason.

Healing the trauma and that wounded child inside is such hard work that it needs everything possible/available to support the process. Nature is a really big help.

### Inger — 2019-09-17T20:44:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278084>

Jason, if you let the healing happen, and you go deep and through it not running away, you will not regret it ever.

Because you will feel alone no more
But just connect to everything and it is so much joy!!! At work, everywhere, I just connect!
People, their eyes, their heart, animals, nature, the clouds, the sky, wow... wow.. it is all so rich and beautiful

and when you have gone through that sort of healing once, you can do it again, because now you know it is nothing to fear, even if it is painful

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-17T20:50:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278087>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=278080)
>
> totally. I can feel how you feel it.. You must have some really deep trauma.
> What also have helped me is to be very careful with what I eat. The wilder my food is the better I feel. It is like it helps the healing process, it gives me power and courage to meet the pain.
>
> Raw elk or deer heart have been some of the best healing foods for me.
> Makes a really nice carpaccio, btw
>
> Ron was visiting me and we had Galloway heart carpaccio. Next morning he told me that in the night he got some really weird feeling of warmness in his chest/belly, he had not experienced before.
> I am pretty sure the heart we had was the reason.
>
> Healing the trauma and that wounded child inside is such hard work that it needs everything possible/available to support the process. Nature is a really big help.

This invokes tearfully, a picture I wish to paint right now.

Its the story of a little boy. Hes shy. Hes introverted. He is unsure of himself. He doesn't know.

He has a mother. She loves him dearly, as her only son. She has her own trauma, her own challenges to deal with, her own patterns of behavior from her own mother and father, that she passes onto this little boy.

She smothers him. She clips his small wings. He cannot fly. In fact, he cannot walk a foot without the watchful eye of the mother. He learns to not know life...and that all he knows is his mother...his attachment to her.. and that she is his world.

That little boy.. or rather this little boys spirit has been buried inside the womb for 30 years. And did not know, or have the ability to know, that perhaps beyond the sphere of his mother..there is another world out there. Big. Cruel. Beautiful. And scary. And to step outside... to let go.. to exit this "truman show"... would be the beginning of his life..

There would be blame for his mother. Anger. Frustration. Denial. Emotions. Heat. Intensity. Struggle.

But at the heart of it... there was a lie that he could not comprehend. A lie that she subconsciously wrote and imprinted onto his psyche. A stockholm syndrome... a deep attachment, love ,fear .. of releasing himself into the wild and never looking back.

You see... There was no real "event" or moment of trauma. No. Instead..only years and years and years of small, subtle, insidious disempowering learned helplessness. A psyche that was formed ... and that now must be destroyed...

Oh...isn't it painful to cut the cord....

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-17T21:40:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278098>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=278090)
>
> It is a good thing... tears are what heals us too.. anything beautiful can melt the ice.. and feeling the sadness is so healing in a way
>
> Jason, have you read the poem in this video? "The mother wound"
> It was very moving to me. The whole video is good. If you do not have time to watch the whole thing, go to 29:12 min. and the poem will be there
>

Thank you so much [@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) . The video was profoundly felt. Just rubbing up against and warming up to the mileau, language found in it. The poem was immense.

An intensity came over me triggered by the video. When I was 14, I was sent away from Canada to England far away in the removed lands of the cotswolds. I was being sent away for bad behavior. Right now this part of the story is not important.

It is, however, some years later when I returned to Canada, where my mother confessed that during the parental-teenager struggles leading up to my departure to abroad, she was near suicidal of my doing. I buried this until now. And now it brings such an intense, weighted, guilt. Tears.

I am not responsible. But in some ways I am responsible for her agony. Our ties are inextricably linked. We are bonded, we are blood. Its hard to reconcile something like that.

J

That was not ok for her to blame you and say that to you. And you are correct in that it is NOT your fault. Not at all. Her agony is hers to bear and hers to own. She was the ADULT raising you, her child. Her job was to protect you- to create safety, honor, value, respect... Do not carry a burden you are not called to bear. You were not responsible for her health and well-being. Not then and not now. Now, as an adult, you can advocate for her, but you aren't responsible. Not unless you have power of attorney over all her life decisions.

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-18T13:44:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278136>

Updates:

Slept 730 to 430am.

I feel calm, rested, healthy today.

I slept at my moms to see how that would change my sleep.. and day 1 has definetely bounced me back into normalcy.

I now realize how super important your sleep environment is!!!!! Without protecting your sleep.. you have utterly nothing !!!

Even more than ever.. I’m looking forward to figuring out of the acreage outside the city will be healthier.. for sure it has to be ?

Sup gaps in the mean time for my condo:
1\. Cpap- get a longer Hose so it’s not by my head all night

2\. Figure out how to turn off router wifi and kill the power on the panel?

3\. Black garner bags on my window

4\. Get out of there as soon as I can. I’m hopefully viewing a plot of land this friday...

J

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-18T14:54:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278140>

I have an idea..

I am lying here in bed wide awake. Trying to “feel” and it’s becoming more clear? Less distortion.

But a tangent happened. I realized there is a patient of mine. An electrician. He has medical issues up the ying yang and On disability. Right under my nose is a glorious opportunity! He talks to me about 5g.. faraday cages.. emf... blue light..

I’m going to hire him to help me assess the acreage and teach me about electricity! He can make some money.. and we can heal together.. maybe he can even pop in on weekends at the acreage to heal!!

Yes.. this idea is awesome ! A mitochondriac I didn’t even see in front of me!!

J

### Saichi — 2019-09-18T20:05:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278192>

LOL @ passive aggressive this is my sincere compassionate side.

Low hanging fruit's a euphemism Phosph, borderline derogatorily so! I'm discussing high level electrosmog toxins!

There are places in my home I've always felt horrible spending time in and never knew why just thought too much stress from life, my electric recliner chair and my desk which used to share the same wall as my furnace in the garage. The e-fields were 15ish volts/m both places.

MIT thinks his mother's weighing down his chest, I'm just both joking and being serious making sure it's not electrosmog weighing down his chest. In his video he flippantly mentioned his bluetooth speaker pod as something maybe worthwhile to mitigate in the future, TURN THAT SHIT OFF NOW FOREVER. Y'all do follow Jack's posts right? Y'all do know what your red blood cells morph into from just minutes of exposure right?

I'm saying if y'all are non-believers (not everyone obviously Inger's legit) and y'all follow Jack then what hope is there for others who don't have the privilege, money, time, remaining neocortex capacity to learn this science.

Time for me to go in the dirty ocean now. I have all my cold plunge materials to do inside my home but I can't do it until I block the microwaves coming from my internet 5G piggybacked line I discovered recently. I won't tolerate 1000 micros anywhere inside my home. I'm wearing silver clothing right now as well because even 80 micros is unacceptable, I can relax under 10 micros.

Think of me as the zen student smacking you (and me) with a stick.

When there's invisible smoke around you is not the time to start vlogging but to put out the invisible fire zapping you.

I won't tolerate 1000 micros anywhere inside my home. I'm wearing silver clothing right now as well because even 80 micros is unacceptable, I can relax under 10 micros.
>
> Think of me as the zen student smacking you (and me) with a stick.
>
> When there's invisible smoke around you is not the time to start vlogging but to put out the invisible fire zapping you.

THANKYOU. I do appreciate your words, your sentiment, I'm digesting it and understanding your POV. I'm trying to see best of your message. But please see my full response below:

You make some heavy-hitting valid points. Truthful points. Without encouraging your ego too much, I'll throw you a bone with what grace and composure I have.... you don't fool around when it comes to the implementation. Kudos to you, as that is a great show of appreciation to Jack's work at the heart of it. You give good feedback when your "other side" doesn't flare up and get in the way of your message.

Here is my rub. I'm fighting myself right now and holding back. I could be inflammatory, derogatory, disrespectful. I could be destructive. But I have empathy, and I care about your progress and journey as much as I care about mine. And I know how to communicate to other sentient beings to that end. We are all works in progress I suppose.

I certainly hope [@Phosphene](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19648/) is right and that your arrows are trending upwards... because I've observed for some time now with intrigue, curiosity, at how you write.. and how others respond to what you write... and what goes on inside your head. I wonder about you.. your ego, your upbringing... your opinion of your self in all its deep and shallow layers. Your familial bonding when you were younger or lack thereof. I wonder if there is psychopathy present. I wonder if you have empathy. I wonder your intentions. How you actually view other people when you write to them? What drives you? I wonder what you are like in person, and in private.

Because I fear you are closed off ultimately and unteachable in ways you need to grow. I hope there isn't a moment in your live where you are banished from special places like this ... and you are left... alone.. in the dark.... on a cold lonely night.. holding your EMF meter in one hand.. and a tissue in the other..tearful... and wonder what happened to your life? I hope I am wrong.

You interest me in more ways than one. I take special notes.

Here is the rub. I can tell you will bring out the worst me in. And I'd rather not have that happen. A destructive kind of bad. For the sake of MY journey, and YOUR journey... I'd rather you not post on my journal. I don't want to post on this journal.

I don't need a fucking zen student.. especially cut of your cloth...of your calibre... to teach me. It only invokes an unkind response where I'd rather smack you back...hard. Id be curious how this lesson would play out in real life... I'm sure it would be comedic when there is nothing to hide behind.

The dunning-kruger force is strong with you... I hope you find a way to measure that one day.

With love and hate...

trend upwards.

J

ps... in case I wasn't clear, get the fuck off my journal. It would mean a lot to me.

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-18T23:24:26+0300

[@Saichi](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23447/)

The existential experience of wartime has always been at the top of my most of utmost fascination. I don't want go through it. But in a way.. if the adversity could reveal the truth of myself via a virtual reality headset... I'd pay a lot of money for that.

We live in so much comfort. I think we, perhaps, as a society, a culture, have been slowly weakened by tech, etc... that we are like sitting, donkey lepers. I do not know how I would fair in WW1. Or maybe this would reveal to me and affirm great power within me.

Maybe I'm just tired of people telling me I've never been through real adversity. Maybe I actually care enough to want to prove people wrong. Maybe I take joy in that to my own unawareness.

Anyways, utterly fascinating.

J

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-18T23:57:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278211>

Revealing Revelations:

If adversity reveals to you YOU, but also what is found within you instilled by others... then this I have to say:

Taking from [@Saichi](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23447/) layer of truly brutal, sterile, factual, clinical honesty...

I need to take a hard fucking look at my life, myself. I've been such a fucking shit head to my parents. Real talk. I was a really really dumb but ballsy kid. That outer layer of me is really truly there, despite whatever complex, beautiful misunderstood inner cogs were going on there. On the outside I was a shit head. And my parents really really loved me. And basically went to nth degree to send me away to straighten up. But even when I came back from the UK, the grief never stopped. I was still a shithead. And today, I am still somewhat a shithead. It's time for them to let go and not worry. But it's also time for me to step the fuck up and stop fooling around with life. I can admit that as a parent, I don't think I could, would, care to do the same for my children that I may or may not have. I dont think I have it in me to cut my skin to give to my child. To that level. No matter how slanted their perception, approach, unhealthiness they were towards me, they did and still do stick by me to this day and never give up on their perceived reality of them wanting the best for me, and worrying and such and such and such. This is real.

I guess where I was initially going with this is this:

If I have power within me.. for example in this moment, to get past my ego of my perceived opinion that [@Saichi](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23447/) is an @@@, that has liberated me.. then what is revealed is a strong unknown to me that my parents have.

KUDOS TO MY PARENTS. Cut then some fucking slack you bastard.

J

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-19T00:15:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278214>

What is truth? What is experience? What is reality?

Does a frenetic, manic..behavior equate to an invalidation of thoughts? Do their point of view become less real, less true, or more real, more true.

I suppose the answer lies in sustainability. If the puzzle fits within a long term, time tested span, then it speaks stronger? Or if it invokes an intensity with which change, if only momentarily, becomes a gateway to the spawning of something brand new that grows and flourishes.

I think I'm unhinged right now. I did get my sleep...lol. But I'm bursting at the seams... I like it.. but I hope this is optimal for me, I hope this is sustainable, and I hope this is healthy.

### LieselK — 2019-09-19T03:48:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278228>

> [MITpowered26 said:](/goto/post?id=278176)
>
> Right now when I sit in dark and try to feel.. its like as if an organic, alive, pulsing shield is in my chest... and its protecting me... and i'm trying to break through it..

Mine was in my throat  Acknowledge it, give it space... Dan Allender talks about "setting the table" with regard to trauma. When you have memories come up you set the table to sit with them. Really honor them and learn truth and decide if you need to sit with them again or move on. I try to do that with all the things now. Just sit with them. You have to learn not to fight against your own body. Why is the shield there? What does it protect you from? Thank it for being there. There is a right time to deal with all the things and your shield kept you safe until you were ready. Are you ready now? It's OK if the answer is no. You will do what you need to do when you need to do it.

​

Just had an uncomfortable interaction with my dad as follows:

DAD: "You are acting really erratic lately"
ME: "Like how, give me an example"
DAD "Like everything"
ME "example please"
DAD " The other day you were sun tanning with your shirt off outside the store, You are a professional, you can't do that, what will others think of you"
ME "Did I do anything illegal? No. That is what is wrong with society. So I don't' really care"
DAD "Well then I'll tell you people are talking behind your back about you"
ME "WHO"
DAD "I"m not going to tell you who, you said you don't care"
ME "K, I storm off irritated"
DAD 5 minutes later (I had dinner at their house): "Go empty the garbages"
ME: "No, I'll do it in 10 minutes"
DAD "but Im taking out the garbages now"
ME "pickup is tomorrow morning, so I can help you in a bit"
DAD: shaken, livid. In chaos. (How dare my Asian son disrespect me).. control, manipulation.. he didn't think I would test him back and put him the one in fucking chaos. he is bent.

Judge me hard if you want to. But its the authentic interaction I had..the truth..

Per Jack's post on deciding to take peoples advice ..the decision algoritmn… this is all done out of his own fear and insecurity.

Does he have a point about the shirt off? Yes. But so do I. And I'm going to live my life, legally, and free.

It's a cold war, a mind game, of control and manipulation. And I'm finally waking up to the guilt control mechanisms that are abound.

Cue the drama
"After everything Dad has done for you and your business.. and you can't even help him with garbage?" -> This isn't about fucking garbage. And I finally realize that now.

I gotta head back to my place shortly and get a good sleep. That will be key. Bye for now [@LieselK](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/21017/)

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-20T18:02:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278366>

MY VLOG: The content, the approach, the why.

Yes, this ties back to quantum biology. Bear with me.

I'm excited by my vlog... so much ! It's going to be a stepping stone to grow ME in so many ways its not even funny.

A podcast I"m meditating on right now is the JRE podcast (joe rogan experience)... I am told its the number one watched podcast in the world. And I'm trying to figure it out. This is what I found:

First lets look at what Joe did not do.

"""""

1.  He did not join a network
2.  He did not listen to the advice from [Radio Professionals](https://www.markramseymedia.com/2017/05/this-is-how-long-your-podcast-should-be/) that said episodes need to be short around 22 minutes.
3.  He did not ask (beg) for ratings and reviews
4.  He did not pay for marketing his podcast or for take over episodes on other shows.
5.  He did not try to monetize it on day one
6.  He did not listen to the advice you must release the same number of episodes each week on the same day and at the same time.
7.  He did not game his title with Keyword spam.
8.  He did not go on forum boards and spam them with listen to my show messages.
9.  He did not hire a team of 10 writers.

Essentially he did not listen to the advice of all the “Experts” (who combined have less downloads per episode then Joe gets alone).

What he did do - was create great content and made each episode the length it needed to be and released those episodes on a schedule that worked for him.

This is never the answer people want to hear on how to grow their shows - people look for some magic bullet or secret method for podcast growth - there is none - it takes work and talent to grow a show - Joe has a lot of talent and did a lot of hard work to get out that great content. His audience responded in that they went out and promoted his show to their friends.

""""

This all ties back into [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) and his teachings. Going against the grain.

Anyways.. the content. EVERYTHING. I want to learn about me.. but do research before each guest comes on, to LEARN about their expertise to ask intelligible questions, to learn about me, about them. To learn.

To not only learn hone my question skills, but hone my ability to tell stories.. shot the shit, appreciate all subject matter, levels of thinking. It's so broad that it's going to put me in chaos, and at its core.. its laser light focused ironically.

I'm going to do this on my terms. For the fun and chaos of growth. For truth. In the name of thinking. And feeling.

Some topics will be me learning quantum biology, but ALL the episodes will be me IN quantum biology:
IE... It will be outdoors, or in red light.. maybe set at my acreage.. uncensored.. unedited... and subliminally .. I will lead by example in the habits of becoming a mito.

J!!!!

### Saichi — 2019-09-20T19:08:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278367>

If you want to get me banned for posting the truth, feel free to do so.

I didn't learn till yesterday I was wrong about how much radiation cell phones give off. Turns out Inger was right my Trifield meter's crap because the peak readings are shown in very small size in the corner while the average is huge and center. After watching Neil at EMF Safety Zone past couple days and taking measurements of my own I've learned the peaks are consistently and VERY frequently over 20,000 micros(the max reading on a Trifield) on my old Samsung cell phone from two feet away. I believe Neil measured around 50,000 on his Acoustimeter, frankly this is absolutely horrifying. I received a thick EMF blocking pouch for my cell yesterday but I still get readings as high as 7,000 micros through it and for to me even use any of the touch screen functions I can't have it in the pouch. I use my cell maybe 20 minutes a day which I never liked but has now turned into 20 minutes of psychological and physical hell.

I thought most phone zombies were caused by instant social media, blue light, and subliminals but turns out microwaves are the primary cause. MIT and all these millennials and younger who grew up and live on their cell phones have literally been zapped into the zombie apocalypse. All our prior joking about zombies turns out wasn't an exaggeration at all. And how many wear wireless headphones over 20,000 micros directly into the brain?! People here worrying about cell towers when all the younger generations are walking around with cell towers attached to their heads!

There's no nice way I can word this for you MIT and anyone else who lives on their cell phones reading this. God knows how much destroyed, mutated DNA and cancer is in your body right now.

This isn't a time to fret about my ego, your ego, or any other distractions. We are walking around with biological bombs constantly detonating. You need to hard wire your computers work and home TODAY and desist using your cell for your daily 10 hours of internet use.

All future vlogs need to be done on a non-wireless capable recording device uploaded on a hardwired computer.

### Saichi — 2019-09-20T20:07:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278376>

For communication on cell I learned from Neil the best option isn't keeping airplane mode on because it still sends out RF but to turn off the cell's cellular data along with the wifi and bluetooth. This way you can still receive and make calls and texts(not on any apps though) while having no RF emissions outside the times when call and texts are being transmitted. Apps are always running and giving off RF.

But regular calls and texts RF are extremely destructive too.

Landline's the only safe option.

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-22T00:00:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278518>

I come bearing news!!!!

Visited the site. Guy ROBERTO was chill but thought It was a bit wierd and a bit concerned about winter warmth. I assured him it’s doable as long as I’m prepared. See readings below in the forest area at the other end of the acreage!

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-22T00:07:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278520>

it's a 12 minute drive from work!!! I hope my rav 4 toyota will handle the back roads in the winter though. I think I'm going to have to get a quad bike so I can easily get from my SUV to the forest area. Another idea.. there is a house that is rented on the property pretty close by. I'll offer to pay a portion of their rent to plug in my vehicle and take a dump there if possible!

I'm so nervously excited.. but alive right now.

I had a good lesson today. I had my cornet running all the way from the store to the location. The RF kept spiking like crazy from 0.0006 up to 250 and higher. I couldn't fucking figure it out. ... and then it dawned on me. I turned off cellular on my phone, I turned off wifi, and I turned off blue tooth, and then I put it on airplane mode. Voila. Readings stabilize as above. I get it now. The smart phone is a cell tower. I get it. Phew.

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-22T12:35:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278547>

Sleep:
7pm to 10pm
And
1230am to 315am

Will try to sneak in another couple hours.. but relatively satisfied with 6 hours.. its Sunday and a non working day so I can also nap later too..

Thoughts of the moment:

\-Alarm bell trap around my tent to tip me off if humans or animals are near

\-escape route / roof top patio / high point sunrise spot .. imagine that? Like a stairway to heaven .. ladder lifeguard structure...only concern here is probably lightning !

**\-health/sleep - I checked in with myself last night. I am sleeping Less lately.. but i have insight and am managing it as I can — at my worst— I’ve always been super high functioning and in control.. so I’m not particularly worried about anything stupid of my own doing**

\-concerns will be again.. warmth.. animals .. and LONELINESS emerging as a top concern. Time to channel my inner zen master!!

\-overall im worried for my well being and safety - and I think that’s a good sign that I care- have insight - on the right track - and am not overly deluded!!

J

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-22T19:19:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278582>

Been discovering what I “actually need” to survive out in Mother Nature... the truth is electricity is overrated.. I never thought that would be possible. Ok let me preface - I’ve deduced that the only things I need to electrical depend on is: plugging my car in Overnight in the winter, charging my laptop, charging my phone. That’s about it. Going get a gasoline inverter for storage near tent in case though - not Inside to to I think carbon monoxide poisoning. Heat: will look at propane or fire stove heater. Not sure, again about propane burning inside. Venting will be key I gather... tipis are such a good design!! I might change course and go with that... lights — 1 candle at night [@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) actually is more than enough. Although maybe a second red head lamp will be nice to go pee AT night or head to the bathroom house for an extended visit.

On Personal hygiene - I’ve been chewing on the Funny idea today that it’s a waste of time.. I mean why? Getting to the root of it all - is it a civilized thing? I wonder if all cultures valued hygiene. If I’m interacting at work - I guess you don’t want to smell.. or have breathe issues. Haha. But that’s like the only fucking thing I can truly think of..?

Public service announcement / I’m still single ladies , HMU (hit me up [@drezy](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19879/) - colloquial for contact me )

### Saichi — 2019-09-22T19:27:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278584>

> [MITpowered26 said:](/goto/post?id=278549)
>
> Been thinking... need to find a way.. to have my smart phone at one corner of the tent.. with hard wired connects to a secondary screen (kindle e ink?) and hard wired to a keyboard .. with a really long cord so I can be far away but still accessing the phone! Same goes for my laptop.
>
> Would be super happy if I could figure this hack out!!!!!

Here's what I'd do. Buy another phone for $20, buy a small weatherproof box structure you can place out in the field about 300 feet away from your tent, buy this ethernet cable:

[https://www.amazon.com/Ethernet-IMONTA-Resistant-Waterproof-Buried-able/dp/B01MA3JGE6/ref=sr\_1\_1?keywords=Outdoor+Ethernet+300ft+Cat6+Cable,+IMONTA+Shielded+Grounded+UV+Resistant+Waterproof+Buried-able+Network+Cord&qid=1569167050&sr=8-1](https://www.amazon.com/Ethernet-IMONTA-Resistant-Waterproof-Buried-able/dp/B01MA3JGE6/ref=sr_1_1?keywords=Outdoor+Ethernet+300ft+Cat6+Cable%2C+IMONTA+Shielded+Grounded+UV+Resistant+Waterproof+Buried-able+Network+Cord&qid=1569167050&sr=8-1)

place the new phone in $19 "RF Kill Box" (link below) but keep the lid open for reception, the intent here being you'll mutate/kill the least amount of organisms around it:

[http://www.lessemf.com/cellphon.html](http://www.lessemf.com/cellphon.html)

Your regular phone you keep inside your tent in another RF Kill Box with mobile data, bluetooth, and wifi off. You can still receive and make regular calls and texts without destroying your mitochondria outside the times you're making calls and texts which ideally should be nil while you're there. Of course you can use apps on your laptop instead to communicate even though the only thing you really should be doing is googling how to make a composting toilet or posting here.

Next time you're there you need to take more conscious e-field measurements starting about 10 meters away from the power line walk away from the power line perpendicularly and make sure the power density drops non-linearly the entire time. My only experience measuring traditional high voltage power lines are around residential power lines so I don't know at what distance really you'd be getting 2v/m but at 400 meters I don't think you should be getting any reading from them. Pretty sure Marino in Going Somewhere said at that distance should be of no concern, meaning there's probably another power source your meter was picking up on you need to suss out.

> [MITpowered26 said:](/goto/post?id=278600)
>
> How do I get it out of the way waterproof box? Any opening would defeat the purpose of waterpoof in deep snow in winter!

Have it on some structure above the highest snow height obviously well secured. The cord will come up the top the Kill Box then come down into a hole through the bottom of the waterproof box you drill out somewhere.

You'll need an adapter like this:

[https://www.amazon.com/C2G-29479-Et...t=&hvlocphy=9032372&hvtargid=pla-811239566779](https://www.amazon.com/C2G-29479-Ethernet-Adapter-Delivery/dp/B07B7P2JY5/ref=asc_df_B07B7P2JY5/?tag=hyprod-20&linkCode=df0&hvadid=366288502003&hvpos=1o3&hvnetw=g&hvrand=5332171365817895511&hvpone=&hvptwo=&hvqmt=&hvdev=c&hvdvcmdl=&hvlocint=&hvlocphy=9032372&hvtargid=pla-811239566779&psc=1&tag=&ref=&adgrpid=74513439485&hvpone=&hvptwo=&hvadid=366288502003&hvpos=1o3&hvnetw=g&hvrand=5332171365817895511&hvqmt=&hvdev=c&hvdvcmdl=&hvlocint=&hvlocphy=9032372&hvtargid=pla-811239566779)

so you can easily plug in a new battery every day or every other day to charge it.

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-23T01:05:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278626>

The eagle has landed - a letter of love

I want to share my experience with you that I had to today. I sat down to write the post.. intending to finally do my neglected laundry of many moons afterwards..and then something dawned on me. I was choosing to write for the sake of impulse, before sorting out my own ship. I felt the moment, and then I became aware in that moment, that I could choose to put myself second, but then who would I be good for? So I did laundry first. I fought rushing it.. I fought getting ahead of myself. And just being in the moment and feeling the moment.

I've come to a realization I'm a collector of people. I chase brilliant minds. Jack is one. TM - my former singing teacher and long time mentor, was another.

I casually mentioned to my former singing teacher's romantic partner, my former piano teacher, about my VLOG the other day. She watched, texted back with a thumbs up...and the conversation ended...the story didn't end there, however.

Shortly later, yesterday in fact, TM reached out to me to go for coffee. It was unusual for him to initiate given the circumstances which which I parted from his music studio. I was excited to see him. I said okay, let's meet! I was looking forward to his advice on the matters that surround my new outdoor adventure in the woods. TM has lived in the bush in prior lives, and I knew he would be just the man to speak to on this matter.

We met for coffee today. What transpired, was not what I envisioned, but that I completely embrace, and feel at peace by.

TM listened to my idea. Then he told me some realities. That there was nothing wrong with the idea...but that I would have certain challenges with which I was approaching this idea.

1\. It is anticipated that my region will have one of the coldest, snowiest winters seen in along time... and that as early as 5 days from now, there would be snow.

2\. He asked if I ever winter camped before - [@Phosphene](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19648/) - with which I said no. He voiced his opinion early on..that it may be a better idea to take a year.. think it through... get the details right .. and then try it out in the spring first. Heck.. he said do weekend camping trips in winter first even... maybe go to a local national park and just be there in -40 C for a day... and experience what that is like.. and inform yourself.

3\. At first glance, it seems like a different value system than "jump without wings and find them on your way down," huh. However, let me tell you why he was correct, given my personal circumstances. Bear with me.

4\. Anyways, back to the discussion... with which he mentioned theft. It's a reality. And that I would have to contend with that eventually.. he suggested things like pouring concrete into a hole in the ground.. and chaining a lock box to it, or something of that nature. And about peeing around the tent can both attract and repel certain creatures.

5\. There were other points.. but you get the drift. He has done this before. And knew how to do it. But that wasn't the point - nor did it convince me that it was a bad idea still...

Then, as he always does with lucidity, precision, and impact, much like when jack speaks in person... he said something to me:
I know you J. You are trying to get ahead of each feeling ([@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/)).. which which I replied "You mean avoid feelings with distraction?" He nodded.

TM said, this is an extreme undertaking. As I've gotten to know you, I've come to believe that you are a more than self-capable man. But what you are not yet, is someone that makes the right decisions.. something to that effect. ..But that tells me you can change, he said.

He explained...the reason you struggle with women, is because they see you, and they get the sense that you are not self-responsible. That you haven't grown the fuck up yet. And that maybe, you cannot be there for them and take care of them. That is why.

My racing thoughts were slowly grounding via his presence at this point. My frenetic mood was settling in.

I confessed to him. And I will confess to you here, publicly. I stopped my meds 3 weeks ago. After 14 years. That was why I am struggling with sleep, and perhaps involved in the forum, idea generation, a little more than usual.

That's the rub. There is nothing wrong with jumping without wings... but to know your own strengths and weaknesses is another thing. My perceived strength ([@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/)) has been my action-oriented manner towards my ideas.. the more outrageous.. the more I wanted to do them. I've come to realize, that was actually my weakness right now. Let me explain.

TM mentioned that there is nothing wrong with radical ideas..with being a radical person. However, society is built to value that the moderate, modest man.. is a rational man.. And so one... especially one of my position in business and health.. must appear as such.

And then so, it becomes a matter of private life ... versus public life. An education of boundaries and two worlds I am getting a crash course in. Radical thoughts and ideas...must be well directed and channeled properly.

I don't know how I would have done in the woods. I'll never know. I'm putting the idea on hold to get my "house" in order first. And to prove to myself, for say a year, that I can be off meds, and be okay. That is.. do simple things... like cook. Like do laundry. Do groceries. And get good sleep.

A quote I remember coming across recently, speaks to this well. "If adventure is the fire of the soul.. then let the voice of reason hold the reins."

TM never admitted this to me. But I believe inside he called the coffee meet because, knowing what he knows of me, having met me in person, spent time getting to know me over the years, he saw something was, perhaps off. And wanted to check in on a old friend in need, to see how I was doing.

I'm going to continue to journal on the forum still, it's important to me. VLOGGING I'm going to rest a bit. My focus will be proving to myself I can act capable, and responsible, given my health concerns. And direct my energy properly. Because from that, I will feel better about myself, and I will make self-impact. And all this energy? Ya. I'm going to direct it into my business, pay off my debts, do things right, and work on the order of my house.. right decisions first and foremost.

I'm not giving up on the off grid idea. I just don't want to about face down the road after much investment, only to jump to the next big idea. I'll do it right, I think. I am blessed with resources to make it happen. So I wish to work hard and do just that.

See you at the members event.  Hopefully by then, I'll be meeting you all with a crisp ironed shirt and a present energy.

J

A safe space (free of microwaves) is the best thing anyone can do for their mental health.

I spent 20 minutes shutting every sub-category off my mother's iPhone with radiation protection gear on and it still sends out RF. If she's having severe withdrawal anxiety from something she almost never uses, there's no chance you'll give it up I have to assume. This is the excellence/perfection of the matrix, make everyone desire our electronic prisons.

If the RF at your place or your mother's is above 10µm I wouldn't expect anyone to get better. Imagine how few people are left in this world who live in (much less below) "slight concern" of exposure.

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-23T14:10:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278659>

I actually remembered a dream for the first Time in a very long time..

I’m sitting in class in university. I’m the back of maybe 4 long rows of students. I start to voice my opinion which is not very well received. It’s pharmacy school it appears. I feel shame. Hostility. Rejection. Mockery.

From there on it’s a hot mess. Class ends and I’m flustered, embarrassed. I hurriedly try to pack my things up.. stuff it in my bag. But I’m the last one to leave as other students have already sat down for the next class.

The remainder of this dream is me getting lost in this massive mazes-school and not finding my way to the next class.

I call someone - wasn’t a family member. I’m suppose to meet at some point... but I’m still lost.

The panick is subsiding and I wake up.

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-23T14:33:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278665>

Last few thoughts before I start my day:

Since the last vip.. I’ve watched sunrise with great enjoyment.. that’s three weeks or so.. and counting...a huge piece of the puzzle is forming..

Stoicism and it’s misconception - it is not the absence of emotion... it’s the “appearance” on the outside of no emotion. To be stoic is to hold a a present space for the excitability, the grandeur, the pain.. in yet remain mindful, meditative... observing.

[@Saichi](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23447/) [@Phosphene](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19648/) [@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/)

The idea has life again..

I missed a point here, that Inger brought up. A. I'm limiting myself based on a "commute" that I deem too "far." That is NOT me going all in. B. Why don't I find a sensible rental SHELTER with SERVICE...or farm even.. out of the city ? Reasonable? Sensible? I think so.

My environment. There are two pieces here ultimately. WORK and HOME. I will focus on home first.. since that is where I sleep. Work I will tackle next.

Time to go home rental shopping!...

Another thing... another thing I did today. I wasted a fucking whole day at work... directing energy at stupid shit. I'm ashamed for what I did. Going on facebook and engaging with what I come to understand as energy vampires. ... I'm not joking ... I spent almost the whole 8 hour shift, give or take, avoiding work and formulating a "comeback" to some idiot kid on facebook. Seriously J? You could have checked in with yourself ya? Into your emotions, thoughts. And realize his hate speech was bringing out YOUR hate speech. And there is no end to that black hole. No matter how destructive that person online seems to be behaving. You have to let them be, let go, and just let things take their course.

The difference between [@Saichi](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23447/) and this idiot on fb? [@Saichi](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23447/) I come to believe is actually well-intentioned. He means well because his message stands for something greater, yknow? He is difficult emotionally to talk to.. its challenging .. but its good for you, y'know?

Time to get back on track with myself. Stay in my LANE. STAY IN MY LANE.

j

### Jack Kruse — 2019-09-24T15:48:53+0300

Big changes going on in Jack world.

Just bought a house at the beach..............

Staying out of my usual lane.

### caroline — 2019-09-24T16:10:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278750>

We have been travelling for 3 weeks and really struggling. Yes, we have had a lot of crap happen, but, I am realising today that we are mainly struggling with being out of our comfort zone. We have met tons of lovely people and lots of them have gone out of their way to help us. We have been to gorgeous places, great pubs, great beer and wine and food.

The reason we are taking this trip is to have an adventure, expand our horizons, have fun .....and it sure is that!

We are starting to settle down and just really enjoy being here, not being home, not doing all our usual stuff....just being open to new adventures.

Being in your comfort zone is ....comfortable - but we need to expect and want much more than that!

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-25T05:26:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278808>

**Pondering on "Normalcy" and Ways of Living**

_I did well today, focused on my work today. I done good._

Running in the background and in between patients, was something tickling me that I've been trying to grasp at and find meaning out of, a good part of the day.

So many people. So many. Ways of life. Of being .Of doing. of thinking. And of feeling. So much rich. [@Sean Waters](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19464/) and the "erratic, impulsive and high intensity behavior" and courageously vulnerable war he wages with chaos and life...that I relate to so much. [@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) and the purity of her still message that seems nothing short of transcendent. the mysteriously whispy and elusive samurai [@Saichi](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23447/) who just pisses me off and pushes me to be a better hooman  [@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) and the sweet, sweet, orchestral music of life she exudes like a daily, fluttering meditation to the world, [@drezy](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19879/) and the witty humor that I struggle to keep up with  but nonetheless has a consistent message of hope, positivism, and lightness underneath... [@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/) the detail oriented, persistent, sherlock sleuth, truth seeker... [@Phosphene](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19648/) the mother hen that has so much love, my #1 cheerleader.. and others others others that I have missed and more others that I seek to get to know better.. and grow with....and someone unknown to the forum, but whom has had profound impact on my life: My music teacher, and the excellence of his stoicism. his masculine, unwavering TLC.... ....................................................................................................................................................and then lastly, Dr. Jon Kruse. The man, the myth, the relentless machine, that has brought us all together. The person. The work. The legacy.

I believe Jack gets a bit more salty with age.. a bit more impatient with things perhaps... when I compare his posts of deep past, and his posts of present. More short, to the point, more.. daring.......... a man dying..with time running out.. everyday.... a mortality that he is acutely reminded of every fucking visceral moment from close close friends that too are dying like they are gasping for their last breathe from their lung...

life is precious.

forever glowing, though..... is an ember... not found the nerves and spines he splices and dices...but an ember that I believe has not stopped glowing deep and resonant inside his heart of hearts since the beginning of his personal story.... a secret, final wish at the final floor moving up the elevator of the skyscraper of his mind..and the impending, final stop of time that waits to greet.. with an answer to the unending search for meaning..within in the dark abyss of his complicated, unknown soul..

The journey of a 1000 people. of a 1000 miles, A 1000 ideas.

I struggle to put it all together, to synthesize a coherence.

My recent "energized state" has me in an existential angst. What is normal? What is the experience of this normalcy? Am I normal?

I don't know enough of the history of civilisations, and uncivilisations, and never will know the truth unwritten by the losers in history.. or how this benchmark model of normalcy fluctuates in time.

what i come to arrive at in this moment is that is really.. doesn't .. fucking ... matter.

we all assert in life so differently.

I am just a man positioned somewhere within this hierarchical structure of society. Weaving his way through it.

I am just a human, gifted in the evolution of our species to have consciousness - we have the ring to rule all the kingdom.

us humans, however, have come past the peak.

we are in decay. 1g, 2g, 3g, 4g, 5g.. blue light, sunlight, DHA, NNEMF!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Time. Tick tock, tick tock.

I am tired. But not without hope.

Why do we emotionally reject others? For complaining? For being negative? For being destructive? For being controversial? For being unhelpful?

Why? Why do I do this? Why do these states of mind have LESS value? The snobbery of constructivism!

Aha.

There is no absolute answer. There is only the human answer. And the human condition is such that we all MUST PROGRESS FORWARD. We desire this. It's built with our DNA. Our mitochondrial DNA sets forth that it puts a kill switch of apoptosis, autophagy, on the weak genes and cells, and so too we correct the brokenness within our psyche and try to do the same in our cultural circles. and pursue forward. Yes. Yes.

It's built into life, into mother nature... an unequilbriated state of affairs and being... for equilibrium is a final destination of rigid, muscular, death. Press forth! Into higher states of trascendence! Deeper states of fear, loathing, and grasping of realities of the human existence! Of crashing forth into chaos and cilffhanging growth! Of blissful gratitude and happiness! Extalling the virtues of the unwavering truth! Of uplifting humor! and of just being motherly LOVE.

We are all traveling on this mother ship on the sea together. We do not know the name of it yet or hardships yet to come.. or its fate...

But what we do know is this. We all share a common dream under the sun, in the atmosphere created for us in this wonderful community.

We all wish to finder a better land and for a better day where we can not talk about any of this anymore! And simple just BE. In harmony. In peace. And know that that will be enough. IT will be enough.

A day where we dock ship at a place and know we have arrived. And we smile at each other, and peer out beyond the ocean, into the sunset. ah yes, then we will have arrived.

Yes! Normalcy isn't a right or wrong way of being, in and of itself. Or thinking or behaving alone. Normalcy is when you share a dream. To reach better places for yourself, your fellow man and woman, and for humanity at large. And set to change and act! Because mother nature demands of us we move forward. And the the only "normal" way forward is to do just that. Actually move forward.

So.. Sick be thy culture, thy artificial man, thy mind. Lost be thy normalcy.

I hope to see you one day on the other side.

But for now, I have to turn my phone on airport mode and sleep.

Keep riding.

j

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-25T12:32:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278825>

**Metamorphosis - Science and Art**

_These days I dream of words. I wake up to pour thoughts onto pages, and look forward to is equally as much, if not more, than my time with sunrise in the morning._

Writing has become a place of much expression, freedom, exploration, and therapy for me. A tumour that grows within my chest that I feed now, like holy bread at catholic church, at daily, double, triple mass. . I just don't know.. what the mechanics of this cancer are?

Do I write for pain or art or both? Am I feeding and enabling an every growing oak tree that stands on attention, narcissism, and vanity and ego? Or maybe this is my long drawn out digital acceptance speech to the world... announcing "here I am." This is me. My introverted, millennial way of assimilating into society, into community. My weave.

I'm so flighty, it is hard to tell whether I am coming or whether I am going in this life. I do not know where I truly belong, and where the homeland is, in fact.

But what I do know is that the more I write to you, the more I affirm within myself what truly is, what I truly am. Someone that has strength in vulnerability - a vulnerability that is ignorant as much as it is naive.. to the parameters and the shackles of this modern day living.. that holds every word and action you release into the world, as fodder for your eventual demise. Yeah. Because I write to live these days. And live to write. It is both pain and art, that seeps off the pages... and the words that I sign my fate with are indeed my freedoms of expression. My FUCK YOU and my offering all in one.

There is a sequence that stick out the most in my mind from the movie "Aviator" about Howard Hughes, the great American aviation pioneer. The first of two sequences.. Howard has descended into complete madness at this point... he locks himself in a cinema room.. alone.. for days and weeks.. only to let someone in to bring him milk. "come in with the milk, come in with the milk, come in with the milk" he says repeatedly, unhinged. He watches aviation tape. His obsessive compulsion is absolutely full blown now.

Switch scene to a flashback of Howard as a child.. his mother is sponge bathing him.. she thinks of his future.. and what will become of him.. she sees, and she knows, and she fears. Dim candle lit. Soft. Sacred.... She speaks: "Howard.. you are not safe in this world"... Chilling.

I'm not sure why Howard has weaved his way at this time into my consciousness. Maybe, I am the case of someone that is starting to believe in himself, someone that is awakening to his own power. Maybe I am, indeed, powerful beyond all measure, as was once famously said in times of past. And maybe there is a mother inside me that is sponge bathing a small child inside.. and is fearful of what is to come, and what is to become of that child. For I have walked this subtle, off the radar, line for what seems a lifetime... carefully hiding myself from my own brilliance, and my own madness.

So what does this have to do with anything I now ask? That is the most interesting question of them all. Why has the caterpillar chosen to spread her majestic butterfly wings on this astral plane. What senses did it pick up? What divinity is afoot.

Mother nature. Perhaps it has something to do with H.E.R.

Mother nature and I. Jack has been the gateway and conduction material of it all. Time. Real community. A real, worthy cause.

Maybe the caterpillar was simply waiting for the right moment... the right conditions... the right time for the sun to shine and align...and then it was ready.

Because there is health - yes. There is the science and the details and the "Bio hacking" as it were. The desire, fundamentally to "get better." Make no mistake though, because whether you are truly awakened or not through this way... mother nature has something in store for you. And the journey does not end there.. it only begins. And the common thread linking, inextricably, the science and the art of this journey in the sun.. is the awakening to the finiteness of our time under it. The awakening to our mortality.

And that my friends, is what has made the caterpillar within me, undergo a metamorphosis. Because it felt right, finally. Because when the truth reveals itself, so too do you reveal yourself...when you see yourself in mother nature's reflection.

J

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-25T16:44:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278843>

**Relationship Redox - Death
**
_People take what they need. You never know what that may be in the end. I took mine.
_
There is something in the impending future that I have not planned for... nobody plans for it, I don't think anybody prepares for it, but should we?

That is: the death of my mother, and realistically, the quicker death of my father.

You see, I do not believe I have experienced the pain of death before... truly. However, after pondering on pieces of Jack's Redox Relationship Part 3 that dropped last night on patreon... I fear for myself. I fear because I think that "guy" he describes in his blog.. the one that dies inside.. and cannot move on from death.. and lets death break him in half... is me. A fantastic unraveling.

My relationship, my journey understanding the relations with my parents is complicated at best. Love and hate. See-saw of emotions. What is certain though, is that my parents raised me.. and imprinted up me, and I am bonded for life. And somewhere deep down inside.. I really really really love them. A lot.

Its a recurring emotional playllst in my mind. Mostly of my dad because I feel he will likely die sooner. A playlist of life after death.. of how I will "react." How I will be able to function. And it worries me, and sickens me. I don't know if it will break me. But In the back of my head, I cannot stop worrying about it.

My relationship and love for my dad, seems more lucid and more simple. I am at a place where I do love him... and can acknowledge that. Maybe also, I have been trying to come terms with his mortality year by year because he is older than my mom.. and I don't have as much time left with him as much as her.

Mom, though. This feels waaaaay more complex. So many layers of anger, guilt, emotions, manipulation, blame...that needs uncovering to see the love and truth and power underneath. It's harder to come to terms with her mortality for sure. And I think, perhaps, if I could put a wager on this worry, she will break me the most. ...

I had a girlfriend once. Vietnamese gal in uni. Overall she tried hard. She had a broken relationship with her dad, however. I don't know the full history, but the extent of his love seemed to be found in a tin can on the kitchen table with cash in it, for her to use... for her to help her buy her friends... ironically.. a similar thing I have and still struggle to NOT do.. buy friends.

Regardless, there came a time when we parted ways. But how she coped was most curious to me. She read the tea leaves in front of her before the broke up came to a head... and she told me she "will prepare by breaking up with me in her head, so when it actually comes time, she can appear emotionally strong to others, and not broken inside." Most curious ...maintaining "face", appearances, and perhaps a social pressure one must contend with, maybe especially as a gal?

Most curious, because this is where I think I am headed with this journal entry, with what I seem to be ultimately planning. Seems different and odd for sure.

I'm not sure if I necessarily should "prepare" emotionally for their eventual death (for the record, they are both "healthy" right now, but just getting old.) But what I really really really need to do, is above all, just observe them. Get to know them. See the truth behind their mask. Look deeper. And maybe that is all for now.

Not sure.

J

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-26T06:02:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278921>

**99% Raw
**
_I don't want to confess the following, but I have no choice.
_
I was going to wait til the morning to write this.. as I'm suppose to be in the middle of a sleep right now. But I've been fighting myself all day, and I have so much to say right now, and so many ways to say it. This is probably the most difficult post I will make. The most raw, truthful, vulnerable ... because it doesn't paint me in a really good light in most ways, other than I am willing to say it. But don't be fooled by me, because talking vulnerability isn't hard for me, it isn't a strength, its attention grabbing neediness..

I''ll bare my soul to you truthfully right now, and fess up. You may react inside with "I can't believe he just said that" or you might secretly laugh or snicker inside. Or maybe you think "this dude needs some sleep and focus" or "oh no, not another navel gazing post about HIMSELF, like what real problems does this motherfucker REALLY HAVE!," "fucking take action already, like fuck! I don't blame the parts of you that feel this way because its true.

So indeed, I confess I felt very vulnerable in the last 24 hours. Why? The truth is because I felt I poured my heart on the pages even MORE than ever my last three long posts, and wasn't happy with my "likes," wasn't happy with the "engagement," and wasn't happy I did not see a Jack Kruse like. The truth? I felt an intuitive shunning, slow ostracizing, distancing, from the forum towards me. Your responses are important to me, and telling me I am wrong (or perhaps right) in my analysis. But what is even more fucking important, is that this is indeed my perception, and therefore my reality. And if the truth sets you free, then here is my truth and this serves as maybe a starting point for healing for me. Digging at the wound, and finding the sickness buried within the tissue.

Make no mistake, even as I fess this, I am thinking "oh this is some brutal truth shit, surely I will get likes now." And the truth is, that my journal is evolving into some fucking addiction where I am mostly concerned with my "likes," with my total "views" and ascending up the popularity rankings of threads, and seeing what other people online and guests are viewing.. and hoping they are viewing my "christmas journal."

Silence is deafening. And if there's anything that triggers me, bends me out of shape, its that. Because when there is nothing to chew on and feed off of, my mind fills in the blanks, however assuming they may be, like gas that expands in the space. An anxiety of stillness.

Maybe this is precisely why I need to tell the truth. Because I need to save me from myself. My own trickery, and self-deception. I NEED to do this. This is NOT brave, its NOT courageous.

This is perhaps exhibit A: Circle of 6 sickness. When you are so inside yourself, "in your feels," that you see nothing but your own self-absorbed pain and have no perspective what so ever. This is why I need people in my life.. to tell me how to think better you know? To correct my thinking and perception. Or else I just keep going further and further down these rabbit holes, unable to save myself.

I could go on and on and on, but I think you get the point. And I don't think gazing any more will help either of us any further.

So go ahead and feed my ego-tech addiction with a like.. or maybe give me silence and frighten my uneasy soul. Pick your poison. Either way it doesn't actually matter in the end. Because if there is any good that can come out of this endless neediness, its that there is nobody there to save me. Nobody.

I apologize on some level for the above. Its a disrespect to everyone's true struggles, real efforts in taking control of their health with their limited time and resources. I just needed to get that out so I feel better.

And so this is what's going to happen: I'm going to try to get some good sleep. Head to sunrise tomorrow. Pick up the pieces of this hyper distraught state of mind, and save myself.

J

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-26T16:24:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278936>

**To Speak your truth**
_Is for the truth to help you, the speaker,the writer, first and foremost. 'help," not enable._

[@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) was kind and compassionate enough to reach out privately to this lost soul of mine, and the message was received. She gave me a beautiful tool for ME. Whether it helps YOU, is not my business, something I'm learning. It goes something like this:

"after sunset, sit your self down, ALONE!, in front of a single lit candle and a mirror. Turn off all the phones, computers, lights, and electricity... and be with yourself.. have a conversation.. let everything surface, and be with it, cry if you need to cry... the healing process is a journey..."

What a beautiful tool that I like a lot!

What much of is clear, is, I have a right to be on this forum. I am not overtly hurting anybody, being disrespectful, breaking forum rules. And that is as much as I need to know. Beyond that, I should use the forum as a tool for myself and help myself first. True giving comes when you have something to give. That will come.

Boundaries and "rights?" are something quite new to me, methinks. I'm the kid that didn't have rights at home. A right to talk at the dinner table. A right to have a door on my room! (That was probably for good reason though as a rebellious teenager). It was hard though.. my mom has boundary issues and it bleeds mightily onto me. When I have every tried to assert any kind of boundary, like something as simple as, can you please knock on the door before you come in (when I finally got a door back), she would set out to destroy these boundaries. I think to sum it up, she says this quite easily "I own you, I own your body, I can do whatever I want to you... I brought you into this world"... there's nothing sinister in that statement, just some fucked up psychological stuff.. stuff that really pisses me off as I write this...and stuff I am sure I will address with myself and her, at some point down the line.

I'm going to try something. No more liking on the forum. And on my journal, I do not wish any more likes. Responses are welcome, but not likes. I will pm or reply to everyone that likes my posts, and remind them each and every time. lol. this is for me, not for vanity. i'm managing the worst enemies that breed inside of me.

My journal is for me. I don't know why I get caught up in stuff like "are they reading? is it helping them?"... stop. it shouldn't ULTIMATELY MATTER to me. Because this is my own, unique personal journey, however "popular" or "relatable" or whatever, it may be. It is my truth, ya?

[@Phosphene](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19648/) "You’re an expressive and abundant writer with a good grasp of poetic flair. **Keep it coming"

Just fucking write. And keep writing. That is all you need, JASON L.
**
I'm really excited to start being alone after sunset, and talk to myself in the mirror. I still have a room mate though... so I may wait for certain until I find a cabin out of town ! I found a pretty affordable lake lot cabin 1 hour outside of the city!! Hopefully viewing sometime soon... will contact them today. I will hope and pray it is a healthy environment based on my meter readings!

I FINALLY got a hold of that electrician patient into all this stuff. He is suffering mightily. I want to hire him.. he says he doesn't want to be paid, but I want to help him with his finances, and ultimately heal with him together on this journey and learn through someone local.. it's nice having a buddy on the journey, y'know? Maybe he will come to visit the cabin to help me assess the environment?

Just write your truth, JL, and make sure the writing helps you ... don't worry about saying something that is politically correct or not, just release it, (as long it is about me only, haha.. I get it can get complicated if I extend this to my opinions of others.. that could get messy) ...release it all, and let the chips fall where they may. You cannot diagnose a cancer you first don't IMAGE. And the treatment plan DEPENDS on an accurate diagnosis. And so I say this.. if you cannot slowly, but surely.. uncover your real brutal truth, to YOURSELF first and foremost (whether you feel the need to share with the world is a different discussion) .. how are you EVER suppose to get better without seeing the disease with clarity.

I mentioned in a previous post about the flavour and brand of different members on this forum... I know my flavor now, and that is simply the uncovering of my own truth.. for better or for worse...

j

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-26T17:41:53+0300

[@Saichi](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23447/) [@drezy](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19879/)

Hey guys. I need to ask of you a question. I want to work in all weathers, right outside of my store on a patio set. Rain, shine, snow, wind. Any ideas on how to do this?

Basic requirements I see:
1\. long Ethernet cord to plug into laptop from inside store (mitigate customer tripping hazard)
2\. laptop (not sure if it will handle winter weather)
3\. propane heater for extreme cold temperatures if I cannot handle CT
4\. Some measure of temporary and conspicuous semi-shelter for high winds, snow, rain, etc...(and to make sure landlord does not take issue with permanent structure)
5\. patio set

thank-you in advanced.

It is really amazing to read back in our journals and see the growth....

### MITpowered26 — 2019-09-26T17:57:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/christmas-tree-journal.23209/post-278947>

Podcast / VLOG

I think I swung to far the other way with my podcast/vlog by stopping it completely.... finding balance.

I'm going to still vlog/podcast.. but in semi-privacy. The world doesn't need to see every part of me, nor do I think the attention on non kruse-spheres will be healthy for my growth.

I still feel verbal articulation, being in front of a camera, is important to my journey. Semi-private in that I may or may not.. share with individuals here and there certain recordings.. if actually, genuinely is from a healthy place of sharing... ie .. not for attention... but rather to ... maybe entertain someone that I believe is of good intention... maybe to engage in a conversation that the video they may resonate with.. basically people in my network that I know enough to know that there is some connection there to be had.. connection seeking.

j

May you gift me with one more truth before you go?

### Inger — 2019-09-26T21:02:06+0300

Imagine, we can give ourselves all the deepest kindest love, understanding, acceptance, comfort, caring and attention we need!! It is so cool!
